title: Deep-Value Opportunity To Invest In High-Yielding Non-Cyclical Stocks
text: Non-cyclical stocks offer steady growth and reliability, attracting investors during economic downturns. Rising interest rates and inflation pose a risk to stocks, making bonds with "durable" interest rates an attractive option. Consumer staples stocks have underperformed in 2023 but may see a turnaround due to potential inflation risks and rising oil prices.

title: Conagra: Growing Dividends And Market Share
text: Conagra Brands is now trading well within value range and pays a growing and well-covered dividend. The company has a strong portfolio of iconic and emerging food brands and has made progress in focusing on its core businesses. While there are some headwinds and risks, Conagra Brands is attractively priced with a solid brand lineup and potential for improvement in its fundamentals.

title: Conagra Brands (CAG) Flat As Market Sinks: What You Should Know
text: In the latest trading session, Conagra Brands (CAG) closed at $31.28, marking no change from the previous day.

title: Conagra Highlights New Consumer Headwinds. Should Investors Be Concerned?
text: Consumer staples giant Conagra followed the normal inflation playbook, raising prices to pass along its own rising costs. Usually, consumers react by not buying as much at first but, after adjusting to higher prices, return to normal spending patterns.

title: Greedflation is not letting up. Here's what companies are saying about it.
text: The second-quarter earnings season so far is showing that one trend that featured in the first quarter has not gone away.

title: This High-Yield Food Giant Will Focus on Its Balance Sheet for Fiscal 2024
text: As fiscal 2024 gets underway, Conagra is looking to reduce leverage. Getting the balance sheet back in shape could be an important catalyst for investors.
